prompt: Bug report: when chat history exceeds MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES, AgentOrchestrator.toPromptMessages (or PromptAssembler if extracted) keeps the OLDEST messages via subList(0, MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES) instead of the newest. Users lose recent context. Fix it so the trim keeps the last MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES entries (history.size() - MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES .. end), matching the original intent of the history cap. Keep MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES == 50. Minimal change. Ensure backend compiles (mvn -q -DskipTests compile in backend/).
